description: Canonical human/machine-readable discovery catalog for GENtle tutorials. This catalog complements, but does not replace, the executable tutorial generation manifest.

entries.title: GENtle Tutorial (Generated)
entries.notes: Generated from docs/tutorial/manifest.json and validated by tutorial-check.

entries.title: TP73 Promoter -> Luciferase Reporter (GUI Tutorial with Matching CLI Commands)
entries.notes: Hand-written GUI-first tutorial with explicit engine and CLI mapping.

entries.title: Retrieve a cDNA and Compare It Against the Genomic Sequence (Dotplot Tutorial)
entries.notes: Screenshot-backed manual tutorial for cDNA-vs-genomic comparison.

entries.title: GENtle Agent Interfaces Tutorial
entries.notes: Conceptual and operational guide for GUI assistant, CLI/shared shell, MCP, and external coding agents.
